title: Outmoded
description: Outmoded is a medieval/low-tech modpack, with focus on providing a challenge - with survival mechnincs, mobs, structures, medieval gear, magic and Create.
body:
Outmoded is a medieval/low-tech modpack, with focus on providing a challenge - with survival mechanics, mobs, structures, medieval gear, magic and Create.

This modpack is experimental and was made for a few friends - feel free to use it but I won't be providing tech support.

Initial template for this modpack was made from [Simply Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/sop) and [Fabulously Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized) as a base.
All rights go to the respective mod creators/contributors/owners.
